channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Build portfolios that pass remote audits
item.description: Ship three projects and stay jobless — real portfolios that got African engineers remote jobs in 2026 used operational artifacts, not just code. Load tests, incident logs, and Grafana dashboards turned applicants into hires.

item.title: Pools exhaust your DB in 3 minutes
item.description: Cut database CPU 30% and p95 latency 77% by fixing the idleTimeout mistake most teams make in 2026. Learn the sustainable pool sizing rule used on PostgreSQL 16, AWS RDS, and Aurora Serverless v2 today.

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt? Pick wrong, waste weeks
item.description: Fine-tuning vs prompt engineering: when to choose each. Learn how to save weeks and $10k+ by picking the right approach for your AI tasks.

item.title: 10 connections? Kill your database
item.description: Cut database connection wait time 70% by setting max pool size to 95th percentile concurrency × 1.5 — modern defaults vs 2018 myths exposed with HikariCP 5.0.1, pgbouncer 1.21, and Aurora PostgreSQL 16.1 benchmarks.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling
item.description: Pick the right realtime tool in 2026 — latency, cost, and code size compared for WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with 3 concrete benchmarks and a 30-minute next step.

item.title: Decode MCP servers before they break prod
item.description: Cut MCP server latency 60% with WebSocket transport, Redis caching, and health checks — real production numbers, failure modes, and code you can run today.

item.title: Multi-tenant databases: stop over-engineering
item.description: Cut multi-tenant database costs 40% with schema-per-tenant — real-world benchmarks, migration scripts, and the compliance trap most teams miss.

item.title: When queues backfire
item.description: Queue you: eue added 50 ms of latency on every transacti. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Expose your codebase to AI without drowning it
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 68% by exposing the right codebase context — dependency graphs, runtime traces, and semantic indexes with concrete tools and commands for 2026.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 3 mistakes that cost us real money
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 78% while dropping empty answers from 16% to 3% — the three mistakes tutorials skip: chunking, reranking waste, and hybrid search setup. Real latency, cost, and recall numbers from a live fintech copilot serving 1.2M users.

item.title: Freelance rates: what actually pays in 2026
item.description: Real freelance rates for 2026 with step-by-step calculator — costs, taxes, buffer, and the hidden gotchas most guides miss

item.title: When abstraction hurts: Go’s 450ms lesson
item.description: Cut API latency 91% and cloud spend 79% by removing hexagonal architecture and adding a two-tier cache. Real numbers from a 2026 Go service rewrite.

item.title: AI APIs: cache, queue, retry or die
item.description: Cut AI API costs 38% with batching, cache, and retries — latency drops from 8.4s to 1.2s in a live Manila system with 8k users.

item.title: Ship one project. Get hired remotely.
item.description: Build one project, not three. Deploy it, measure it, document it. Remote job offers from Africa follow real impact — not GitHub stars. 2026 playbook with real stacks, metrics, and hiring pipelines.

item.title: From 2K to 12K monthly: how I went global
item.description: From $2.1K to $12.4K monthly: how one engineer turned a single open source fix into a global rate with uvicorn and FastAPI.

item.title: Tech lead pay: when 300k isn't enough
item.description: Cut unpaid engineer hours 66% by fixing latency and connection pool frictions — the real reasons senior engineers leave big tech in 2026.

item.title: Optimize LLM Pipeline Metrics for Production Success
item.description: Add observability to LLM pipelines with Prometheus: track latency, token usage, and error rates. Cut response times by 25% with retries and validation.

item.title: 5G’s backend blind spots
item.description: Cut 5G backend latency 60% with Redis caching, connection pool tuning, and HTTP/2 — the real mistakes teams make on cellular networks

item.title: Cut cloud carbon 30% without latency
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 31% with zero latency penalty — the AWS Customer Carbon Footprint Tool, CloudWatch Synthetics, and a 180-line Lambda@Edge router that routes traffic to the cleanest grid.

item.title: Self-taught? Skip the LeetCode parade
item.description: Self-taught devs waste months on LeetCode drills. Build one real system instead — with metrics, logs, and post-mortems. Reduces interview prep time by 60% and increases offer rates by 3x.
